{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Arelius family elders
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The elders of the [[Arelius family]] can rein in the Patriarch.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16">''Skysworn'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Arelius family elders]] were displeased with [[Eithan]]'s handling of recent matters, specifically [[Lindon]]'s lost duel.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18">''Skysworn'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
